generic_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in valid component type scopes or implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
Preserve AADL architecture when inserting generated AGREE annex blocks
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use valid variables or outputs to represent subcomponent ports in component type contracts
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: Defensive rules for assumed type vs actual type
